Getting Started with pressR
text: pressR parses, analyzes, visualizes pressure distribution data capacitive sensor systems. provides: Predefined sensor layouts (-shoe insoles, pressure platforms, saddle mats, seating mats, glove sensors), Parsers ASCII CSV pressure data files, full analysis pipeline (per-frame metrics, trial summaries, regional analysis, gait-cycle detection, saddle-fit checks), ggplot2-based visualization composite reports, interactive Shiny application data exploration.

text: pressR parses, analyzes, visualizes pressure distribution data capacitive sensor systems. ships predefined layouts -shoe pressure measurement, saddle pressure mapping (equine bicycle), seating assessment, barefoot pedography, along interactive Shiny application data exploration.

title: Pressure Distribution Analysis for Capacitive Sensor Systems
Pressure Distribution Analysis for Capacitive Sensor Systems
code: library(pressR)  trial <- pr_example_trial("insole")  pr_plot_heatmap(trial) pr_plot_force_time(trial, show_cycles = TRUE)  pr_summary(trial) pr_calc_regional(trial)

title: Pressure Distribution Analysis for Capacitive Sensor Systems
text: Parsers ASCII pressure data exports, generic CSV, force sensor data, region mask files (.msa/.msr/.msp). Predefined layouts -shoe insoles (99-sensor), barefoot pressure platforms, generic sensor mats (16x16 / 32x32), horse bicycle saddles, wheelchair / car / office seating, glove sensors. Per-frame per-trial analysis: peak pressure, mean pressure, force, contact area, pressure-time integral, center pressure, symmetry index, gait cycle detection, COP rollover pattern. Application-specific analysis: saddle bridge slip detection, wheelchair hotspot identification, plantar-pressure regional analysis. Published reference thresholds saddle fit (von Peinen 2010, Moenkemoeller 2005, Werner 2002), diabetic foot risk, wheelchair seating. Visualization: 2D 3D heatmaps, dynamics plots, regional bar charts, composite report panels, side--side trial comparison. Shiny app (pr_run_app()) interactive import, analysis, export.

title: Create a Pressure Sensor Layout — pr_layout
text: grid_rows Integer. Number rows sensor grid. grid_cols Integer. Number columns sensor grid. active Logical matrix dimensions grid_rows x grid_cols. TRUE cells contain active sensors. coords_mm Data frame columns sensor_id (integer), row (integer), col (integer), x_mm (numeric), y_mm (numeric). Physical coordinates active sensor millimeters. regions Named list logical matrices (dims active). entry defines anatomical functional region. sensor_area_cm2 Numeric. Area single sensor cell cm². pressure_range Numeric vector length 2. Min max measurable pressure kPa. pressure_unit Character. Unit pressure measurement. Default "kPa". name Character. Sensor model/system name.

title: Summarize Trial Pressure Parameters — pr_summary
Summarize Trial Pressure Parameters — pr_summary
text: trial pr_trial object. threshold Numeric. Threshold "loaded" sensors. Default 0.

title: Summarize Trial Pressure Parameters — pr_summary
text: one-row tibble::tibble columns: mpp: maximum peak pressure (kPa) mvp: mean per-frame mean pressures (kPa) max_force: maximum total force (N) mean_force: mean total force (N) max_contact_area: maximum contact area (cm^2) mean_contact_area: mean contact area (cm^2) contact_time: total contact duration (s) pti_max: maximum PTI across sensors (kPa*s) pti_mean: mean PTI across loaded sensors (kPa*s) impulse: force-time integral (N*s) cop_path_length: total COP trajectory length (mm) cop_velocity_mean: mean COP velocity (mm/s) cop_range_ap: anterior-posterior COP range (mm) cop_range_ml: medial-lateral COP range (mm)
